steps.title: Compare fertilizer groups
steps.content: The researchers concluded that nitrogen fertilizer increases cantaloupe yield. The strongest support must compare the nitrogen-treated plants with the control plants in each year, not just describe one year or one group alone.

steps.title: Use the consistent pattern
steps.content: A is false because the nitrogen yield drops below 30 in 2019. C conflicts with the conclusion, and D lacks a control comparison. The graph supports the conclusion by showing nitrogen yields above control yields every year. The answer is B.
